app.title: Realeaf Botanicals — Brand Collection
app.heroDesc: Masterfully crafted cannabis products created to elevate your experience and exhilarate your life.

brands.name: Skyy
brands.tagline: Dual Tanks. Skyy Smooth. Flavor Fusion On Demand.
brands.desc: Experience the perfect blend of craft cannabis and innovation with Skyy, elevating your vibe to new heights. Our dual-tank pod device delivers unmatched flavor fusion for the discerning enthusiast.

products.name: Dual Tank Pod Device
products.desc: The Skyy Dual Tank Pod Device is engineered for the ultimate flavor fusion experience. Switch between two strains on demand with our patented dual-tank technology. Sleek, pocket-sized, and built for the modern cannabis enthusiast.

products.name: Skyy Pod — Blue Dream + Wedding Cake
products.desc: A harmonious blend of Blue Dream's energizing clarity and Wedding Cake's relaxing euphoria. Two perfectly matched strains in one pod, ready to switch on your command.

products.name: Skyy Pod — Strawberry Cough + Lemon Haze
products.desc: Wake up your senses with the bright, fruity fusion of Strawberry Cough and Lemon Haze. This sativa-forward blend delivers uplifting energy and crisp citrus notes that keep you going.

products.name: Skyy Pod — Sunset Sherbet + Gelato
products.desc: Unwind with the creamy, dessert-inspired fusion of Sunset Sherbet and Gelato. A luxurious indica blend that melts away the day and delivers waves of relaxed euphoria.

products.name: Skyy Starter Kit
products.desc: Everything you need to experience Skyy. Includes the Dual Tank Pod Device, one pod of your choice, and a USB-C charging cable. The perfect entry point into the Skyy experience.

brands.name: Fyre
brands.desc: Enjoy Fyre Pre-Rolled Cannabis for a smooth, fire experience that ignites your senses and sets the vibe ablaze. Crafted in small batches for maximum potency and consistent burn.

products.name: Fyre Minis — Original Blend
products.desc: The classic Fyre experience. Eight perfectly rolled mini pre-rolls packed with our signature blend. Smooth draw, consistent burn, and the signature Fyre kick every time.

products.name: Fyre Minis — Sativa Blend
products.desc: Light up and level up. Our sativa-dominant mini pre-rolls deliver energizing, cerebral effects perfect for social situations and creative endeavors. Pure fire, every puff.

products.name: Fyre Minis — Indica Blend
products.desc: Wind down with our indica-dominant mini pre-rolls. Deeply relaxing, full-bodied effects that calm the mind and soothe the body. The perfect end to any day.

products.name: Fyre King Size Pre-Roll
products.desc: When minis aren't enough, go king size. Our flagship 1.5g pre-roll is hand-rolled with premium craft flower for a luxurious, extended smoking experience from start to finish.

products.name: Fyre Infused Minis
products.desc: Elevated beyond the ordinary. Our infused mini pre-rolls are coated in premium kief for enhanced potency and a slow, silky burn. For those who demand more from every session.

brands.name: Rayne
brands.tagline: Rain Or Shine. These Drops Hit Every Time.
brands.desc: Unwind with Rayne Drops — our infused gummies with juicy fruit flavors that provide a perfectly mellow experience. Each drop is precisely dosed for consistent, delightful effects you can count on.

products.name: Sour Power Drops — Variety Pack
products.desc: The ultimate variety experience. Our Sour Power Drops Variety Pack features an assortment of tangy, fruit-forward gummies that hit exactly where you want them, every single time. 100mg total.

products.name: Rayne Drops — Strawberry
products.desc: Sweet, ripe strawberry flavor infused with precisely 10mg of THC per drop. Juicy, consistent, and absolutely delicious. Rain or shine, Rayne Drops in Strawberry hit right.

products.name: Rayne Drops — Watermelon
products.desc: Crisp, refreshing watermelon bursting with flavor in every chew. Our Watermelon Rayne Drops deliver the same precise dosing and reliable effects in a summery, beloved flavor.

products.name: Rayne Drops — Blue Raspberry
products.desc: Bold, tangy blue raspberry with a satisfying sour kick. These drops pack the perfect punch of flavor and 10mg THC per drop — for those who like their Rayne with a little zing.

products.name: Rayne 2:1 CBD:THC Drops
products.desc: A perfectly balanced blend for those seeking a milder, wellness-focused experience. Our 2:1 CBD:THC drops offer gentle relief and relaxation without overwhelming psychoactive effects.

brands.name: Foryst
brands.tagline: Craft Cannabis. Small Batch. Exceptional Quality.
brands.desc: Foryst delivers premium craft cannabis flower in small, carefully curated batches. Each strain is hand-selected for its unique terpene profile, potency, and overall smoking experience.

products.name: Cara Cara
products.desc: A deeply relaxing indica with sweet citrus notes and hints of berry. Cara Cara's dense, resinous buds deliver a powerful body effect paired with a pleasantly euphoric mental state. A true craft classic.

products.name: Hella Jelly
products.desc: Sweet, fruity, and undeniably dank. Hella Jelly is a balanced hybrid with a complex terpene profile featuring notes of grape, berry, and tropical fruit. Smooth smoke, well-rounded effects.

products.name: Jelly Donutz
products.desc: Sweet, doughy, and delightfully relaxing. Jelly Donutz lives up to its name with dessert-forward terpenes and a deeply calming indica experience. Perfect for evening sessions.

products.name: Jungle Sunset
products.desc: A vibrant, energizing sativa bursting with tropical and citrus terpenes. Jungle Sunset delivers an uplifting, creative high perfect for daytime adventures and outdoor activities.

products.name: Humboldt Dreams
products.desc: Inspired by California's legendary growing region, Humboldt Dreams is a premium hybrid with earthy pine, lemon, and spice notes. A well-balanced, long-lasting experience that soothes without sedating.

products.name: Boo Berry Cookies
products.desc: A hauntingly good indica cross with notes of blueberry, vanilla, and earthy sweetness. Boo Berry Cookies delivers a creeping body high and dreamy, relaxed mental state. A fan favorite.
